info.name: My Collection - UniFab Updated
info.description: Updated UniFab backend collection based on the original Postman collection, refreshed for the quote-token workflow, print request lifecycle, custom design requests, local design quote flow, MyMiniFactory readiness overrides, pricing, materials, and cleanup endpoints.

item.name: auth
item.description: Authentication and current-user checks. Login requests save access tokens into the environment for later folders.

request.description: Confirms the server is running.
Creates a new client for this collection run. The email is generated automatically each run.
Logs in the generated client and stores clientAccessToken.

exec: pm.test('Access token cookie is present', function () { pm.expect(accessCookie, 'accessToken cookie').to.be.ok; });

request.description: Logs in the admin from the environment and stores adminAccessToken. Fill adminPassword before running.

exec: pm.test('Access token cookie is present', function () { pm.expect(accessCookie, 'accessToken cookie').to.be.ok; });

request.description: Fetches current user using the client bearer token.
Fetches current user using the admin bearer token.
Smoke test for forgot password. Uses the generated client email.
Negative documentation test: refresh requires a refresh token cookie/body.
Admin reads current pricing config.
Admin updates pricing config. Values match the clean seed defaults.
Creates or documents admin material creation using a unique generated key.
Updates the generated material.

item.name: upload slicer profile for test material

request.description: Uploads a .ini slicer profile version for the generated material.
Deactivates the generated test material.
Lists active local designs and does not call MMF because q is omitted.

item.name: search design library with MMF query

request.description: Searches local designs and MyMiniFactory. MMF may be unavailable depending on network/API key; backend should still return a structured response.
Creates an active local design used by local-design and completed-design-request quote tests.

formdata.value: Local design fixture created by Postman.

request.description: Lists active local designs.
Fetches the created local design.
Updates metadata on the created local design.
Lists MyMiniFactory admin overrides.
Marks an MMF object as print-ready by admin override. This documents readiness approval only.
Updates readiness override flags.
Public slicer-backed model upload quote. Does not require authentication.

exec: const json = pm.response.json(); pm.environment.set('uploadQuoteToken', json.data.quoteToken); pm.environment.set('uploadQuoteTotalPrice', json.data.totalPrice);

request.description: Restores quote data from a short-lived quote token.
Public quote for an active local design.
Admin-only cleanup of expired unused quote records and associated managed upload files.

item.name: submit print request from upload quote

request.description: Client submits a print request from a valid unused upload quote token.
Negative test showing quote tokens are single-use.
Negative test showing request submission cannot bypass quote validation.
Client lists their print requests.
Client fetches their print request detail.
Admin lists all print requests.
Admin moves request from pending_review to approved.
Admin issues payment slip; status becomes payment_slip_issued.
Client uploads receipt; status becomes payment_submitted.
Admin moves the request to payment_verified.
Admin moves the request to printing.
Admin moves the request to completed.

item.name: submit print request from local design quote

request.description: Client submits a print request from a local-design quote token.

item.name: design-requests
item.description: Custom design request workflow added after the original collection.

request.description: Client submits a custom design request.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Postman Custom Design",
  "description": "Please design a small calibration stand.",
  "preferredMaterial": "PLA",
  "dimensions": "40mm x 40mm x 20mm",
  "quantity": 1
}

request.description: Client lists their custom design requests.
Admin lists all custom design requests.
Admin approves the custom design request.
Admin links a completed custom design request to the local design fixture.
Client quotes a completed custom design request.

item.name: client submit print request from design request quote

request.description: Client submits a print request from the completed design-request quote token.
